  "claims": [
    "The CLEAR Act requires law enforcement agencies to screen candidates for participation in hate groups that promote hate crimes or genocide.",
    "The infiltration of law enforcement agencies by extremist organizations has been well-documented.",
    "California's police departments have been involved in scandals related to officers expressing racist, homophobic, or threatening messages over social media.",
    "The State Auditor reviewed the public social media accounts of about 450 officers and found at least 17 posted negative stereotypes or deliberately hateful and derogatory speech directed at specific groups.",
